args.content:
Hawaii Vacation Packing List
=============================
Based on: Vacation Plans (June 10 - June 20, 2024)

DESTINATION: Hawaii
DATES: June 10th - June 20th, 2024

CLOTHING:
  - Swimwear (multiple sets for beach days and water activities)
  - Casual outfits (lightweight, breathable fabrics for warm weather)
  - Hiking gear (sturdy shoes, moisture-wicking shirts, hiking shorts/pants)
  - Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
  - Flip-flops / sandals
  - Comfortable walking shoes
  - Dressier outfit for Luau (June 16) and evening dinners
  - Hat / cap for sun protection
  - Sunglasses

TOILETRIES & PERSONAL CARE:
  - Sunscreen (reef-safe, high SPF)
  - Aloe vera / after-sun lotion
  - Insect repellent
  - Lip balm with SPF
  - Shampoo & conditioner
  - Body wash / soap
  - Toothbrush & toothpaste
  - Deodorant
  - Razor & shaving cream
  - Personal medications

BEACH & WATER GEAR:
  - Beach towel
  - Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins) — or confirm rental for June 12
  - Waterproof phone case / dry bag
  - Water shoes (for rocky areas)

ELECTRONICS:
  - Camera (for capturing memories — beach, hiking, Luau)
  - Phone & charger
  - Portable power bank
  - Waterproof camera / GoPro (optional, for snorkeling & kayaking)
  - Headphones / earbuds

TRAVEL DOCUMENTS:
  - Passport / ID
  - Flight tickets / e-tickets
  - Hotel reservation confirmations
  - Activity bookings (snorkeling, Luau, Pearl Harbor, etc.)
  - Travel insurance documents
  - Credit cards & some cash

MISCELLANEOUS:
  - Daypack / backpack (for hiking & day trips)
  - Reusable water bottle
  - Snacks for hikes and road trips
  - Books / e-reader (for relaxation day)
  - Shopping tote (for Ala Moana Center on June 19)
  - First-aid kit (band-aids, antiseptic, pain relievers)
  - Zip-lock bags (for wet items)

ACTIVITY-SPECIFIC NOTES:
  - June 11 — Waikiki Beach: Swimwear, sunscreen, beach towel
  - June 12 — Hanauma Bay Snorkeling: Swimwear, snorkeling gear, waterproof bag
  - June 13 — Diamond Head Hike: Hiking gear, water bottle, hat, sunscreen
  - June 14 — Pearl Harbor: Comfortable walking shoes, respectful attire
  - June 15 — North Shore Road Trip: Casual outfit, camera, snacks
  - June 16 — Polynesian Cultural Center Luau: Dressy-casual outfit, camera
  - June 17 — Hotel Spa Day: Relaxation — just bring yourself!
  - June 18 — Kailua Beach Kayaking: Swimwear, water shoes, waterproof bag
  - June 19 — Ala Moana Shopping: Comfortable shoes, shopping tote
  - June 20 — Departure: Travel documents, pack everything!

Enjoy your Hawaiian adventure! 🌺🌊🌴
